## Build number updated?

- [ ] Yes — I incremented `__build__` in `version.py` (project root)

> The build number must be incremented for every PR without exception —
> including documentation, maintenance, and one-line changes.
> This is how The Architect tracks cumulative effort across all sessions.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Type hints present on new public functions
- [ ] No debug `print()` statements or `TODO` comments remaining
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] `ARCHITECT.md` updated if an architectural decision was made
